description: The Bruzzaniti are a 'ndrina (clan) of the 'Ndrangheta criminal organization, originating from Africo, Calabria, Italy. They are active in the Milan area and are allied with the Morabito, Palamara, and Crisafulli clans. The article provides a brief overview of their history from the 1970s to the 2020s.

country_links.evidence_quote: L'uomo che intratteneva i rapporti tra la Calabria , Milano e il Brasile era "Leone Autelitano"
country_links.context: The organization maintained contacts between Calabria, Milan, and Brazil for drug trafficking.

country_links.evidence_quote: sequestrati a Milano 250 chili di cocaina proveniente dal Sud America che passava da Dakar in Senegal e successivamente dal Porto di Genova
country_links.context: The organization routed cocaine through Senegal as part of an international drug trafficking operation.
